topic: A person changing a flat tire on a car.

parsed_generation.script:
Shot 1 [00:00-00:02]: The person loosens lug nuts with a wrench — front view
Shot 2 [00:02-00:05]: The person lifts the car with a jack and slides the wheel free — side-angle
Shot 3 [00:05-00:08]: The person installs the spare wheel, tightens lug nuts, and lowers the car — top-down
parsed_generation.narration: Across eight seconds, a single person changes a flat tire on a car. The sequence moves from loosening lug nuts, to lifting and removing the wheel, then installing the spare and lowering the car.
